question: What can we conclude about the overall performance across channels in the latest year?

options.A: All channels clearly performed much worse in the latest year than in previous years.
options.B: The latest year proves that the marketing mix should be changed immediately.
options.C: We cannot make a valid statement about the latest year's full performance because the data only cover an early part of the year.
options.D: Online has permanently lost effectiveness in the latest year.

explanation: The latest year includes only about 3 months of data, whereas earlier bars represent full-year totals. Stacking the partial-year totals next to full-year bars makes the latest year look dramatically worse across all channels, but this is a consequence of inappropriate aggregation of time, not a true performance collapse.
